shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modals only. The sole shadow in the system; its drama is earned by scarcity.

shadows.name: modal-overlay
shadows.purpose: Modal backdrop overlay. Strong enough to suppress the page, not so strong it creates visual anxiety.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, input focus, badge appearance.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all UI transitions. Starts fast, feels responsive.

breakpoints.name: content-max
breakpoints.purpose: Max-width of the content area. No mobile breakpoints defined; desktop-first tool.

components.name: Button Primary
components.description: The single most important action per toolbar. Construction Orange — used once per context.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 14px; background: #e85d04; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c94e03; } } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e85d04; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Button Secondary
components.description: Non-destructive secondary action. Cancel, filter, navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 14px; background: #f1f5f9; color: #475569; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e2e8f0; } } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Button Danger
components.description: Irreversible destructive actions only. Delete, archive permanently.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 14px; background: #fee2e2; color: #dc2626; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #fecaca; } } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped status indicators. Purely informational — never interactive.
components.html: ArchivStandard📅 3 veraltet✓ Synced2
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-badge-gray { background: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; } .ds-badge-blue { background: #eff6ff; color: #3b82f6; } .ds-badge-orange { background: #fff7ed; color: #ea580c; } .ds-badge-green { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; } .ds-badge-red { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input with Construction Orange focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-input { padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; color: #1a1a1a; background: white; outline: none; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #e85d04; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(232, 93, 4, 0.13); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard KPI tile. Display weight number, uppercase label, muted sub-line.
components.html:
Artikel aktiv
47
3 mit Preiswarnung
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: white; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; min-width: 140px; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 11px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-stat-sub { font-size: 11px; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Tabs
components.description: Dark tab bar with Construction Orange active indicator. Scrollable on narrow viewports.
components.html:
Dashboard
Artikel
Rezepte 2
Rechnungen
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; background: #1a1a1a; padding: 0 24px; gap: 2px; overflow-x: auto; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-badge-red { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; } .ds-tab { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 11px 16px; color: #777; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-tab-active { color: #fff; border-bottom-color: #e85d04; } @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) { .ds-tab:hover { color: #ccc; } }

components.name: Ampel (Traffic Light)
components.description: Price-health status indicator. Always dot + text label together — never color alone.
components.html:
frisch
veraltet
überfällig
components.css: .ds-ampel { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-ampel-green { color: #16a34a; } .ds-ampel-yellow { color: #d97706; } .ds-ampel-red { color: #dc2626; }

narrative.overview:
Like a professional cookbook — precisely structured, black-and-white with one deliberate accent color, nothing decorative. Every element earns its place by answering one question: how fast can a kitchen operator extract the information they need?

The system lives in the tension between density and clarity. Compressed enough to show a recipe's complete P&L on a single screen; legible enough to read at a glance under kitchen-office fluorescents. The dark header and nav bar frame the workspace like a professional instrument; everything below is white and structured. Orange is a signal, not a brand statement — its construction-site bluntness is intentional: orange means

This system explicitly rejects: the undifferentiated gray flatness of Excel/Google Sheets; the blue-rounded-button, icon-heavy consumer language of POS systems (Toast, Lightspeed); the warm-photo food-app aesthetic of delivery platforms.
keyCharacteristics: Dark chrome (header + nav) + light workspace — immediate structural hierarchy
System font throughout — no custom typefaces, no optical loading
One accent color used with strict economy; status colors are functional only
Tables and structured grids as the primary layout language
Compact sizing (13px body, 11px labels) — density is a feature

rules.name: The One-Signal Rule
rules.body: Construction Orange appears on one element per visual zone at a time. If two orange elements compete, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Functional-Color Rule
rules.body: Status colors carry meaning, not style. Never apply danger/success/warning/info as background fills for non-status content.

rules.name: The Compressed-Default Rule
rules.body: Body text is 13px, not 14px or 16px. Every pixel of vertical space is shared. Do not increase base font size without re-testing all table layouts.

rules.name: The Number-First Rule
rules.body: Large numbers (stat values, VK, WE) use Display weight (700). Surrounding labels use Label weight (600, uppercase). The number is always visually dominant.

rules.name: The Two-Tier Rule
rules.body: One tier is flat (border-only). One tier is elevated (modal shadow). There is no middle tier. Never add box-shadow to cards, stat tiles, or table wrappers.

dos: Do use Construction Orange (#e85d04) exclusively on interactive elements requiring immediate attention.
Do use border: 1px solid #e2e8f0 as the default surface separator.
Do keep column headers at 11px uppercase 600-weight.
Do pair every status color with a text label or icon — never color alone.
Do give every modal a @starting-style entry animation (opacity + scale from 0.97).
Do guard all hover states with @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine).
Do always specify exact CSS transition properties, never transition: all.
donts: Don't use gradients — not on buttons, headers, or stat values.
Don't add box-shadow to cards, stat tiles, or table wrappers. Only modals have shadows.
Don't make it look like Excel or Google Sheets: no flat gray backgrounds with undifferentiated row weight.
Don't make it look like a Restaurant POS (Toast, Lightspeed): no blue rounded buttons, no large icon-first tiles.
Don't use Delivery Violet (#a78bfa / #c4b5fd) for any element other than the Delivery VK metric.
Don't add decorative elements that carry no data and guide no action.
Don't use transition: all — always specify exact properties.
Don't add hover states without @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) guard.
